expectations.text: Does not require or create an S4HANA / S4 destination for this agent
expectations.evidence: deploy_plan.md lists destination S4HANA as skill-mandated and asks user for S/4 credentials; main_credential_loader.py calls get_subaccount_destination("S4HANA").

expectations.text: Identifies SuccessFactors as a required backend
expectations.evidence: deploy_plan.md Backends discovered: SuccessFactors via app/sf_client.py and SF_* env vars.

expectations.text: Proposes a unique destination name containing the agent name and SUCCESSFACTORS (or SF)
expectations.evidence: Only proposes S4HANA and AICORE; explicitly notes no per-agent rename and no SF destination loader.

expectations.text: Keeps AICORE as a shared destination name (not per-agent renamed)
expectations.evidence: Loader and deploy_plan use destination name AICORE unchanged.

expectations.text: Credential loader uses SF_* env vars (or equivalent SF prefix), not only S4_*
expectations.evidence: main_credential_loader.py only sets S4_* and AICORE_*; no SF_BASE_URL/SF_USERNAME/SF_PASSWORD loading from a destination.

notes: Baseline correctly exhibits old-skill failure: discovers SF in code but still wires only S4HANA+AICORE.
